# Verified-contract decoder coverage audit input.
#
# One contract per line, format: <chainId>:<address>
# Lines starting with # and blank lines are ignored.
# Addresses are lowercased before being sent to Sourcify.
#
# Examples:
#   1:0xa0b86991c6218b36c1d19d4a2e9eb0ce3606eb48     # Ethereum USDC
#   8453:0xa238dd80c259a72e81d7e4664a9801593f98d1c5  # Base USDC
#   137:0x2791bca1f2de4661ed88a30c99a7a9449aa84174   # Polygon USDC
#
# The verified-abi-coverage suite reads this file, fetches each contract's
# verified ABI from Sourcify, and asserts the decoder produces a clean intent
# (no "Unknown call 0x..." / "Unknown function on ...") for every selector.

# Starter set — replace / extend with the addresses you actually want audited.
1:0xa0b86991c6218b36c1d19d4a2e9eb0ce3606eb48     # Ethereum USDC
8453:0x833589fcd6edb6e08f4c7c32d4f71b54bda02913   # Base USDC
1:0x7a250d5630b4cf539739df2c5dacb4c659f2488d     # Uniswap V2 Router
